INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SERVICE CONTRACT
This agreement is governed by the laws of France. Any dispute shall be referred to the courts of Paris.
The client shall pay the provider for IT support services monthly. Payment terms are 30 days.
The scope of services includes network monitoring and server maintenance as defined.
The parties shall keep all client data strictly confidential.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
